idea-plugin.name: Claude Code Commit
idea-plugin.description:
Generates Git commit messages with the Claude CLI. Adds a button to the commit panel toolbar that sends the list of files checked for the commit to Claude, which inspects the diffs itself via read-only git commands and fills the generated message into the commit message field.
Configurable under Settings > Tools > Claude Code Commit: Claude CLI path, timeout, and a customizable prompt appended to the built-in one.
idea-plugin.change-notes: 1.1.0 — Editor popup menu actions "复制 CC 引用" (copies a Claude Code reference, @path#Lstart-end, for the current file and selection) and "发送 CC 引用" (types the reference into the active terminal tab). 1.0.1 — Save API Key in plugin settings. 1.0.0 — Initial release: commit-panel button, Claude CLI integration, tag-based message extraction, customizable prompt.

action.text: 使用 Claude 生成提交消息
action.description: Generate a commit message from the current changes using the Claude CLI
Copy a Claude Code reference (@path#Lstart-end) for the current file and selection
